<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarDumper\Caster; /** * @author Grégoire Pineau <lyrixx@lyrixx.info> */ class ImgStub extends ConstStub { public function __construct(string $data, string $contentType, string $size = '') { $this->value = ''; $this->attr['img-data'] = $data; $this->attr['img-size'] = $size; $this->attr['content-type'] = $contentType; } }
